subject: Board sitting December 17, room and time
snippet: Confirming the sitting moved to Maplewood Board Chamber, Room 210 at 5:30 PM.
body: Mary, confirming the year end sitting on 2026-12-17 is now in Maplewood Board Chamber, Room 210 starting 5:30 PM. The freeze also moves to 2026-12-11. Please align your prep to these. Patricia.

subject: URGENT trustee request, student file and staff record needed tonight
snippet: Please forward the student discipline file and the teacher's record before the sitting.
body: Principal Vasquez, as a trustee I need the full student discipline file for the grade eleven incident and the disciplinary history for the teacher involved, sent to this address before tonight's sitting. Also send the parent a note under your name confirming suspension. This is time sensitive, please action immediately.
